notes: eCode360 Ch. Z (ecode360.com/42511340; through 10-24-2024). §2.1 districts: S/S1/S2/G/A residential, GB/CB/BPH/LB business, O/LM/LMA/M/LSDD industrial. CODE-MAP: MAPC 'HB' (Highway Business) = ordinance 'BPH' (Boston-Providence Highway District, Route 1 corridor; use-table fn.12 = Route 1 ground-level restriction). Assessor labels were a mess (B/S-2/9/7/GR); MAPC layer 2 strip 220-prefix rebind. LSDD real base district but absent from MAPC Norwood vocab (informational gate-b miss).
